name: APIChange
description: A single machine-readable API change detected between two versions of an API specification by a spec-diff or change-tracking tool.

id.description: Stable identifier for the API change.

api_id.description: Identifier of the API the change applies to.

severity.description: Whether the change breaks existing consumers.

scope.description: Part of the API specification affected.

path.description: OpenAPI path or JSON pointer to the affected element.

method.description: HTTP method when the change applies to an operation.

from_version.description: API specification version before the change.

to_version.description: API specification version after the change.

description.example: Added new POST /v1/subscriptions endpoint to create recurring billing subscriptions.

tool.description: Tool that produced the diff record.

detected_at.description: Timestamp when the change was detected.

changelog_entry_id.description: Identifier of the customer-facing changelog entry that documents this change.
